items.claim: Conor McGregor's karate stance mixed with boxing was a tricky style for his opponents.
items.quote: Conor McGregor had an excellent I say had lol had an excellent karate stance that he mixed with the boxing and that was really tricky for people

items.claim: Conor McGregor's front kick to the body is potentially the best in the sport.
items.quote: His front kick up the middle maybe the best we've ever seen in the sport as well.

items.claim: Max Holloway has been more active at a high level than Conor McGregor.
items.quote: Max has seen so much in the game, guys, and he's been so active at such a high level.

items.claim: Max Holloway will maintain pressure and finish Conor McGregor in the later rounds.
items.quote: I THINK HE'S A LOCK AS THIS FIGHT goes into two and especially three, four, and five. I think Max Holloway keeps the pressure on him. Puts him away

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt has not won a round since 2023.
items.quote: CODY GARBRANDT hasn't won a round since 2023.

items.claim: Kai Kamaka III has not been finished in a long time.
items.quote: Hasn't been finished in a very LONG TIME.

items.claim: Luke Riley is more dangerous and has more power than Kai Kamaka III.
items.quote: I think Luke Riley is much more dangerous. Has more pop on his shots, more consequence.

items.claim: Mario Bautista is a significantly better fighter now than he was in 2019.
items.quote: He's nowhere near the guy he was in 2019 when he got submitted by Cory Sanhagen.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen has a submission grappling advantage over Mario Bautista.
items.quote: Cory Sanhagen does have a submission grappling advantage on the feet.
